summary: Dispatched task: Update the Swarm Control Plane to reflect all agents being active and operational. Sync card parity across workers, ensure the main-agent continuity mirror is current after the bring-in, and confirm the control plane visually and operationa

event.task: Update the Swarm Control Plane to reflect all agents being active and operational. Sync card parity across workers, ensure the main-agent continuity mirror is current after the bring-in, and confirm the control plane visually and operationally reflects all 12 workers.
event.rationale: Control plane state management is swarm3's responsibility — when agents come online, the mirror and cards need updating.
